Trusted Since 1909

Giving Textile Waste a Second Life

For over a century, Fiber Conversion Inc. has transformed textile byproducts into valuable industrial fibers. We help manufacturers reduce waste, lower costs, and build a more sustainable supply chain.

Explore Our Services Contact Us
115+ Years in Business
NY Proudly Based
100% Commitment to Recycling
What We Do

Comprehensive Textile Recycling Solutions

From collection to processing, we provide end-to-end fiber recycling services that keep textile waste out of landfills and back in the supply chain.

Fiber Processing

We process raw textile waste into clean, graded fibers ready for reuse in manufacturing applications across multiple industries.

Learn More

Waste Collection

Reliable pickup and collection services for textile manufacturers. We handle your waste streams so you can focus on production.

Learn More

Custom Fiber Solutions

Need a specific fiber blend or grade? We work directly with you to develop custom recycled fiber products tailored to your specifications.

Learn More
Our Story

A Legacy of Sustainable Innovation

Since 1909, Fiber Conversion Inc. has been a cornerstone of the New York textile recycling industry. What started as a small fiber reclamation operation has grown into a full-service recycling and processing facility trusted by manufacturers across the Northeast.

Every bale of fiber we process represents waste diverted from landfills and raw materials preserved for future generations. Our commitment to the circular economy isn't a trend — it's been our mission for over a century.

Read Our Full Story
1909
Year Established

Proudly serving the New York community for over a century

Why Fiber Conversion

Built on Experience. Driven by Sustainability.

We combine over a century of expertise with modern processing technology to deliver reliable, high-quality recycled fibers.

Trusted Heritage

Over 115 years of continuous operation, building relationships and delivering consistent quality to our partners.

Zero-Waste Goal

We are committed to diverting textile waste from landfills and maximizing the value of every fiber we process.

Custom Solutions

Every customer is unique. We tailor our fiber processing to match your exact specifications and delivery schedules.

Customer First

At Fiber Conversion, the customer always comes first. We build long-term partnerships rooted in reliability and trust.

Industries Served

Recycled Fibers for Every Application

Our processed fibers serve a wide range of industries, providing cost-effective and sustainable alternatives to virgin materials.

Automotive

Sound insulation, trunk liners & padding

Building & Insulation

Thermal & acoustic insulation products

Furniture & Bedding

Padding, stuffing & cushion materials

Nonwovens

Geotextiles, filtration & industrial fabrics

Paper & Pulp

Fiber feedstock for specialty paper products

Industrial Applications

Wiping cloths, absorbents & more
Work With Us

Whether You're Buying or Selling

We work with both textile waste generators and manufacturers who need quality recycled fibers.

Have Textile Waste?

We'll collect and process your textile byproducts, helping you reduce disposal costs and meet your sustainability targets.

Sell Your Waste

Need Recycled Fibers?

Browse our selection of high-quality processed fibers, available in custom blends and grades to meet your production needs.

Request a Quote

Ready to Make the Sustainable Choice?

Join the growing number of manufacturers who trust Fiber Conversion for reliable, eco-friendly fiber solutions.
